articles.title: New therapies could help type 1 diabetes care move beyond insulin alone
articles.description: Disease-modifying therapies for type 1 diabetes are beginning to move care beyond insulin replacement by targeting immune dysregulation, beta-cell stress, and preservation of endogenous beta-cell function. articles.title: Blood test detects tumor DNA to guide advanced cancer treatment
